title: [StandardToHandshake] Replace liveness analysis with SSA maximization
body:
This commit replaces liveness analysis within the `StandardToHandshake` conversion pass with an SSA maximization step, which makes all dataflow explicit (except on `memref` block arguments and memory allocation operations' results) in every function by forwarding values explicitly through block arguments to the block(s) where they are used. The bulk of this transformation is performed by utilities included in a new pass (`--maximize-ssa`) that converts every std-level function within a module into maximal SSA form. 

This commit also makes cosmetic modifications to unit tests that see some of their operations locally reordered due to the change. Two `memref`-related tests are also added to check for correctness of load/store conversion in the presence of multiple basic blocks.

Fixes #3754.
